message:
fix(ui): correct dark mode contrast for count badges

Fixed backwards contrast values where dark:text-neutral-600 was used
(darker text in dark mode). Changed to dark:text-neutral-500 for proper
contrast. Also added missing dark mode variants for count spans.

Files fixed:
- PromptCard.tsx: tag count, token count
- CategoryFilter.tsx: category counts
- TagFilter.tsx: tag counts, "+N more" badge

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
